title: Spookiz Season 1
synopsis: When night falls and the human kids from Freemont Elementary have all gone home, these wacky monsters creep out for their own slapstick adventures. Together, a vain Vampire, a happy-go-lucky Goblin, a smelly Zombie, a snuggly Frankenstein and a mischievous Ghost share a common bond and friendship in their adventures at night school. (Source: Amazon Prime)

title: Rainbow Bubblegem 2: Secret
synopsis: When the bubble gems scatter, exhausting their magical powers, peace returns to the sea, and Purple wants to go back to school on land, but the Purple King is stubbornly opposed. After some serious convincing, Purple announces her intention to run for queen, and is finally allowed to return to the surface. But what lies ahead for her? One day at the beginning of a new semester, Purple loses her magic wand and her only princess dictionary while trying to protect her friend Leo from the villainous Blobs, Black Diamond's subordinates. Then, White Gold, the guardian of the sea, senses the dark energy and gives her a new catcher and princess dictionary as gifts. With this, Purple creates new bubble gems for the other princesses and upgrades their magic, but she is unable to create a bubble gem with her own color. The seven mermaid princesses, along with their new human friends including Leo's senior student Gray, the seven mermaids battle the returning and more powerful Black Dia. Without h

title: Oideyo Mahou Shoujo-mura (Fuhou Senkyo)
titleNative: おいでよ魔法少女村（不法占拠）
synonyms: Welcome to Magical Girl Village (illegally occupied)
synopsis: Tomakomai (43 years old) is an old office worker who has become a magical girl as a result of power harassment by the company president. She (he) settles in a magical girl village where the happy Nemuro (120 years old? I don't remember anymore) and Seikou (270 years old? I don't remember anymore) live, who can't live without alcohol. The magical girl life in this (illegally occupied) village filled with madness and despair begins! (Source: Official Synopsis, Translated)

title: Genshin Impact - Sunset
synopsis: Time flies straight like an arrow, winding like a road with no end. No one could have known the profound solitude of journeying through the passage of time, Or how time itself could wash away the meaning of their long odyssey. Yet, if their will has never been broken and their steps have never once faltered... At the journey's end, they will rediscover the very purpose that first set them on their way.
